fields.name: Eternal Red Rosee
fields.description: A stunning arrangement of 24 long-stemmed red roses, carefully hand-picked and arranged to create a timeless expression of love. Each rose is carefully selected for its beauty and freshness, ensuring your message of love is delivered with elegance and passion.
fields.instruction_text: Keep in cool place. Fresh flowers last 5-7 days with proper care.
fields.delivery_info: Free delivery in select areas. Same day delivery available before 4 PM.

fields.name: Sunshine Yellow Tulips
fields.short_description: Bright yellow tulips to light up their day
fields.description: A cheerful bouquet of 20 fresh yellow tulips that bring sunshine and happiness to any room. These Dutch tulips are known for their vibrant color and elegant shape, making them perfect for birthdays, get-well wishes, or just to brighten someone's day.
fields.instruction_text: Trim stems at 45-degree angle and change water every 2 days.
fields.delivery_info: Free delivery. Available for same-day delivery.

fields.name: Pink Paradise
fields.description: A beautiful combination of pink roses, carnations, and lilies creating a soft and romantic arrangement. Perfect for anniversaries, birthdays, or just to show you care. The gentle pink hues convey affection and admiration.
fields.instruction_text: Mist flowers gently with water to keep fresh.
fields.delivery_info: Delivery available all days. Order before 2 PM for same day.

fields.name: Purple Elegance
fields.description: An exotic arrangement featuring purple orchids, lavender, and complementary foliage. This sophisticated bouquet is perfect for formal occasions, anniversaries, or when you want to make a truly memorable impression.
fields.instruction_text: Orchids require minimal water. Avoid direct sunlight.
fields.delivery_info: Premium delivery included. Gift wrapping available.

fields.name: Mixed Summer Blooms
fields.description: A vibrant mix of seasonal flowers including gerberas, lilies, and chrysanthemums in assorted colors. This bouquet brings the freshness of summer to any home and is perfect for any happy occasion.
fields.instruction_text: Remove leaves below water line to keep water clean.

fields.name: White Wedding
fields.short_description: Elegant white flowers for special moments
fields.description: A pristine arrangement of white roses, calla lilies, and baby's breath. Perfect for weddings, anniversaries, or as a sophisticated gift. The all-white palette symbolizes purity, elegance, and new beginnings.
fields.instruction_text: Keep away from direct sunlight and drafts.

fields.name: Rainbow Mix
fields.description: A joyful explosion of colors with gerberas, carnations, and roses in every shade of the rainbow. This cheerful arrangement is guaranteed to bring a smile to anyone's face and is perfect for birthdays, celebrations, or just because.
fields.instruction_text: Change water daily for longest life.

fields.name: Luxury Red Velvet
fields.short_description: Premium red roses with velvet finish
fields.description: Our most luxurious red rose arrangement featuring 36 premium red roses with a velvet-like finish. Each rose is hand-selected for perfection and arranged in a beautiful keepsake box. The ultimate expression of love and passion.
fields.instruction_text: Comes with premium flower food. Follow instructions on packet.
fields.delivery_info: White glove delivery service. Recipient signature required.

fields.name: Spring Daffodils
fields.description: A cheerful bunch of 15 fresh yellow daffodils that herald the arrival of spring. These beautiful flowers symbolize new beginnings and are perfect for birthdays, get-well wishes, or simply to brighten someone's home.
fields.instruction_text: Daffodils release sap that is harmful to other flowers. Best arranged alone.
fields.delivery_info: Free delivery. Available in select areas.

fields.name: Orchid Delight
fields.description: A single stunning phalaenopsis orchid plant in a decorative ceramic pot. These long-lasting orchids bloom for weeks and make an elegant gift for any occasion. Low maintenance and perfect for home or office.
fields.instruction_text: Water once a week with 3 ice cubes. Keep in indirect light.

fields.name: Birthday Bash
fields.description: A festive arrangement designed especially for birthdays! Featuring bright gerberas, cheerful sunflowers, and colorful carnations, this bouquet is guaranteed to make the birthday person feel special and celebrated.
fields.instruction_text: Includes a free birthday card with your personalized message.
fields.delivery_info: Gift wrapping included. Same day delivery available.

fields.name: Anniversary Bliss
fields.description: Celebrate your love with this romantic arrangement of 18 red and white roses. The combination symbolizes unity and lasting love, making it the perfect anniversary gift. Presented in elegant wrapping with a special card.
fields.instruction_text: Flowers come with preservative sachet. Mix in water.

fields.name: Get Well Wishes
fields.description: Brighten their recovery with this cheerful arrangement of yellow roses, daisies, and carnations. The vibrant colors and fresh fragrance are sure to lift spirits and speed recovery. A thoughtful way to show you care.
fields.instruction_text: Remove from packaging immediately and place in water.

fields.name: Thank You Blooms
fields.description: Express your gratitude with this elegant arrangement of lilies, roses, and orchids in soft pastel shades. A sophisticated way to say thank you for their kindness, hospitality, or support.
fields.instruction_text: Includes flower food. Change water every 2-3 days.

fields.name: Sympathy Tribute
fields.description: A dignified arrangement of white lilies, roses, and chrysanthemums to express your condolences. The serene white flowers convey peace and sympathy during difficult times. Delivered with a heartfelt message card.
fields.instruction_text: Handled with special care. Please specify delivery date.

fields.name: Congratulations Graduate
fields.description: Celebrate their achievement with this vibrant bouquet featuring sunflowers, roses, and colorful gerberas. Perfect for graduation, new job, or any achievement worth celebrating. Comes with a congratulatory card.
fields.instruction_text: Fresh flowers guaranteed for event.

fields.name: New Baby Boy
fields.description: Welcome the new arrival with this adorable blue-themed bouquet featuring white roses, blue delphiniums, and baby's breath. A perfect gift for new parents to celebrate their baby boy.
fields.instruction_text: Safe for nursery. Non-toxic flowers only.
fields.delivery_info: Comes with a cute teddy bear.

fields.name: New Baby Girl
fields.description: Celebrate the arrival of a baby girl with this lovely pink arrangement of roses, carnations, and pink lilies. Adorable and heartwarming, this bouquet is sure to delight new parents.
fields.instruction_text: Flowers are baby-safe and non-toxic.

fields.name: Love You Mum
fields.description: Show Mom how much you care with this beautiful arrangement of her favorite flowers. Featuring roses, lilies, and carnations in soft pink and white hues, this bouquet is perfect for Mother's Day or any day.
fields.instruction_text: Includes special Mother's Day card.

fields.name: I'm Sorry
fields.description: Make amends with this sincere arrangement of white and pink roses, symbolizing forgiveness and hope. Sometimes flowers can say what words cannot. Let this beautiful bouquet help you mend fences.
fields.instruction_text: Hand-delivered with a personalized apology card.

fields.name: Thinking of You
fields.description: Let someone know they're on your mind with this thoughtful mix of pastel roses, lilies, and seasonal flowers. Perfect for no special reason except to make someone smile.
fields.instruction_text: Fresh flowers arranged daily.

fields.name: Valentine's Special
fields.description: The ultimate Valentine's Day gift! A passionate arrangement of 30 red roses with baby's breath and festive foliage. Wrapped in romantic red and pink tissue paper, complete with a love message card.
fields.instruction_text: Order early for Valentine's Day delivery.

fields.name: Housewarming Joy
fields.description: Congratulate them on their new home with this warm and welcoming arrangement of sunflowers, roses, and bright gerberas. A perfect housewarming gift that brings life and color to any new space.
fields.instruction_text: Long-lasting flowers ideal for home.

fields.name: Retirement Blessings
fields.description: Celebrate their well-deserved retirement with this elegant arrangement of orchids, lilies, and roses in gold and white tones. A sophisticated gift for a new chapter in life.
fields.instruction_text: Premium long-lasting orchids.

fields.name: Corporate Elegance
fields.description: A sophisticated arrangement perfect for corporate gifting or office reception. Featuring elegant white orchids, anthuriums, and modern foliage in a sleek ceramic container. Makes a lasting impression.
fields.instruction_text: Low maintenance office-friendly arrangement.

fields.name: Tropical Paradise
fields.description: Bring the tropics home with this exotic arrangement of birds of paradise, heliconia, and ginger flowers. A stunning centerpiece that transports you to a tropical paradise. Perfect for destination-themed parties.
fields.instruction_text: Keep in warm environment. Mist regularly.

fields.name: Rustic Charm
fields.description: A charming bouquet of wildflowers and garden roses in a rustic burlap wrap. Perfect for country weddings, farmhouse decor, or anyone who loves the simple beauty of nature.
fields.instruction_text: Dried naturally for extended beauty.

fields.name: Modern Minimalist
fields.description: Sometimes less is more. A single stunning calla lily or orchid stem in a minimalist glass vase. Contemporary, chic, and perfect for modern spaces. Available in various colors.
fields.instruction_text: Easy care. Just add water.

fields.name: Sweetheart Roses
fields.description: A dozen red roses arranged in a beautiful heart shape, expressing your love in the most romantic way. Presented in a special heart-shaped box with a love note. Perfect for proposals or anniversaries.
fields.instruction_text: Preserved roses last up to a year.

fields.name: Birthday Surprise
fields.description: The ultimate birthday surprise! A beautiful bouquet of birthday flowers paired with a box of chocolates and a birthday balloon. Everything you need to make their day special.
fields.instruction_text: Chocolates may melt in hot weather.

fields.name: Anniversary Gold
fields.description: Celebrate 50 years of love with this golden-themed arrangement featuring yellow roses, golden chrysanthemums, and gold-painted foliage. A fitting tribute to a golden anniversary.
fields.instruction_text: Special gold wrapping included.

fields.name: Wedding Bouquet
fields.description: A stunning bridal bouquet of white roses, stephanotis, and trailing ivy. Hand-tied with satin ribbon, this classic bouquet is perfect for the bride on her special day. Custom colors available.
fields.instruction_text: Order at least 2 weeks in advance.

fields.name: Bridesmaid Posy
fields.description: Beautiful matching posy bouquets for your bridal party. Smaller version of the bridal bouquet in coordinating colors. Each comes with satin ribbon and can be personalized.
fields.instruction_text: Set of 4 minimum order.

fields.name: Corsage Wrist
fields.description: Elegant wrist corsage perfect for proms, weddings, or formal events. Featuring miniature roses and orchids on an elastic band. Available in your choice of colors.
fields.instruction_text: Can be made ahead and refrigerated.

fields.name: Boutonniere
fields.description: Classic boutonniere for grooms, groomsmen, or prom. Single rose or orchid with greenery, pinned and ready to wear. The perfect finishing touch for formal attire.
fields.instruction_text: Can be pinned easily.

fields.name: Centerpiece Classic
fields.description: Beautiful round centerpiece for wedding or event tables. Features roses, hydrangeas, and candles in a low profile design that won't block conversation. Approx 12" diameter.
fields.instruction_text: Rental of vase included.

fields.name: Tall Centerpiece
fields.description: Make a statement with this tall, dramatic centerpiece featuring branching orchids, curly willow, and hanging amaranthus. Perfect for head tables or entryways. Approx 3 feet tall.
fields.instruction_text: Sturdy base included.

fields.name: Garland Swag
fields.description: Lush fresh garland of mixed greenery, perfect for draping along banquet tables, staircases, or mantels. Approximately 6 feet long. Creates a beautiful natural look for any event.
fields.instruction_text: Keep misted for freshness.

fields.name: Flower Crown
fields.description: Romantic flower crown for the bohemian bride or flower girl. Handcrafted with fresh flowers and greenery on a comfortable base. A beautiful alternative to a veil.
fields.instruction_text: Custom sizing available.

fields.name: Dried Flower Bouquet
fields.description: A beautiful bouquet of dried flowers including pampas grass, lavender, and preserved roses. These long-lasting arrangements require no water and will stay beautiful for months or even years.
fields.instruction_text: No maintenance required. Avoid moisture.

fields.name: Peony Perfection
fields.description: A stunning arrangement of lush, full peonies in shades of pink and white. Peonies are beloved for their romantic, fluffy blooms and intoxicating fragrance. A truly luxurious gift for someone special.
fields.instruction_text: Seasonal availability - usually spring.

fields.name: Hydrangea Heaven
fields.description: Voluptuous blue hydrangeas arranged in a beautiful ceramic pot. These big, beautiful blooms create a stunning visual impact and are perfect for housewarmings or as a statement piece.
fields.instruction_text: Keep well-watered. Hydrangeas drink a lot.

fields.name: Lavender Fields
fields.description: A generous bundle of fresh, fragrant lavender stems. The soothing scent promotes relaxation and the beautiful purple spikes add rustic charm to any room. Can be dried and enjoyed for months.
fields.instruction_text: Can be air-dried for long-lasting enjoyment.

fields.name: Sunflower Smile
fields.description: A cheerful bunch of giant sunflowers guaranteed to bring a smile. These happy flowers follow the sun and bring warmth and joy to any space. Perfect for birthdays, get-well, or just because.
fields.instruction_text: Sunflowers are heavy drinkers. Keep water topped up.

fields.name: Gerbera Burst
fields.description: A burst of color with vibrant gerbera daisies in assorted bright colors. These cheerful flowers are known for their huge blooms and long vase life. Perfect for any happy occasion.
fields.instruction_text: Change water every 2 days for longest life.
fields.delivery_info: Color assortment may vary by season.

fields.name: Lily Elegance
fields.description: An elegant arrangement of fragrant oriental lilies in shades of pink and white. Lilies are known for their stunning blooms and sweet fragrance that will fill an entire room. A sophisticated gift.
fields.instruction_text: Remove pollen stamens to prevent staining.

fields.name: Calla Lily Sophistication
fields.description: A sleek, sophisticated bouquet of white calla lilies. Their elegant, trumpet-shaped blooms represent magnificent beauty and are perfect for modern, minimalist aesthetics or formal occasions.
fields.instruction_text: Handle with care - stems are delicate.

fields.name: Freesia Fragrance
fields.description: A delicate bouquet of freesia in pastel colors. These dainty flowers are beloved for their sweet, citrusy scent that will perfume your entire home. A beautiful, fragrant gift.
fields.instruction_text: Remove lower leaves to keep water clean.

fields.name: Iris Beauty
fields.description: A striking arrangement of purple iris, the flower that symbolizes wisdom and hope. Their unique form and rich color make them a memorable gift for someone special.
fields.instruction_text: Iris have a shorter vase life but are beautiful.
fields.delivery_info: Pairs well with other spring flowers.

fields.name: Delphinium Dreams
fields.description: Dramatic tall spikes of delphinium in shades of blue and purple. These majestic flowers create height and drama in any arrangement. Perfect for adding a touch of elegance to special events.
fields.instruction_text: Support stems may need staking.

fields.comment: Absolutely beautiful roses! They lasted for over a week and the color was vibrant. Perfect for anniversary gift.
Very good quality flowers. Delivery was on time. Would recommend.
Stunning arrangement! My wife loved it. The roses were fresh and well packed.
Excellent service and beautiful flowers. Will order again!
Good quality roses. Slightly pricey but worth it for special occasions.
Perfect condition on arrival. Flowers lasted 8 days! Highly recommended.
Good flowers but delivery was a bit late. Otherwise okay.
Amazing fragrance and beautiful presentation. Great gift choice!
